description.value: Deadly Predator. Your claws, teeth, and stinger are natural weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. If you hit with them, you deal 1d6 + your Strength modifier kinetic damage. Additionally, as a bonus action, you can perform a special bite or stinger attack. On a hit, the target suffers the attack’s normal effects, and it must make a Constitution saving throw (DC = 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Constitution modifier). On a failed save, the target is poisoned until the end of its next turn, and you can’t use this feature again until you complete a short or long rest.
